src: Matlab toolbox to integrate normal (Gaussian) distributions in any dimensions with any parameters in any domain, compute pdf/cdf/inverse cdf of any function of a normal vector, and measures of classification performance among two or more multinormals, like error matrix and d'.
ja: 任意の次元・任意のパラメータ・任意の領域で正規（ガウス）分布を積分し、正規ベクトル関数のpdf/cdf/逆cdfを計算し、誤差行列やd'などの2つ以上の多変量正規分布間の分類性能指標を求めるMatlabツールボックス。
